choices: Go to the Character List -->>
1.content:
Now for the big question?
Who do you find yourself shrunk around?
1.title: Start

choices: Judy Alvarez
Panam Palmer
Misty Olszewski
Rogue
Next -->>

11.title: Characters - Set 1

choices: Call Judy's number.
Stay close to the wall and wait for Judy to come out of the braindance.
Use the wire of her monitor to climb onto her desk.
Try to climb up Judy's body
Leave the room and go upstairs, to the Moxes' nightclub.
111.content:
You look around the giant room in shock. You recognize this place, it’s the basement of Lizzy’s bar, The Moxes’ club. This is where you and Evelyn met with…

A giant black sneaker boot with a white rim steps down in front of you. You panic and look up, as two towering legs dressed in leather overalls walk over you.

“Judy…” you mutter to yourself.

The giantess walks to her desk and puts on her braindance gear. A hallucination of Johnny Silverhand appears beside you.

“Good job, kid.” He says. “Almost got us snuffed under a porn editor’s sneaker.”

You take a few deep breaths, leaning on your knees. Everything around you is massive. Judy is massive. As you try to get your head straight, you look over at Johnny.

“What do I do now?” You ask.

Johnny shrugs. “The way I see it, you’re already fucked. Your only way of getting help, just dove into a raw braindance. No way to get her attention, as long as her entire mind is wrapped up elsewhere.”

You walk across the open floor. “I think I know what to do.”

“Alright, don’t fuck this up V.” Johnny says, before his hallucination disappears.

You look around the room to check your options.
111.title: Shrunk in Judy's Workshop

choices: Wait here, until Judy is done with the braindance.
Try and end the braindance yourself, by climbing her keyboard.
Enter the bag of chips, to grab a snack.
Try and climb up her bare arm.
Call her number.
1113.content:
You run up to Judy’s desk, you can’t believe how long it takes for you to get there. To the giant girl it was only three steps, to you it feels like three blocks. When you finally make it to the black wire of her monitor, you look up, dreading the climb ahead. Covering that distance is going to take some time, and if you fall, you doubt anyone would notice the bloody speck on this dirty floor. You get over yourself, and hug the big black tube, shuffling you way upward. As you travel the long way up, you look around the room at the massive size of it all. Every now and then, Judy’s leg shift around, you wonder what’s going on in the braindance she’s editing.

After twenty minutes of shimmying up the black rubber, you’re finally able to drop down behind her monitor. As you walk around, onto the open desk you get a better view of her. The closed off, but cute looking Mox, sits in front of you like an imposing god, blind and unware to the mortal on her desk. You look around for something you can use. You see an opened bag of chips, which you can steal from if you’re hungry. Behind you lays Judy’s keyboard, which makes you wonder if you weigh enough to press down the key to end her braindance. You look up at the colorfully haired girl one last time before you make up your mind.
1113.title: The Desk of the Unaware Mox

choices: Ask her to watch over you for a bit.
Tell her she can keep you if she wants.
Ask her to take you to a ripperdoc.
Ask her to put you back on the floor.
Ask her to give you a good and personal death.
11131.content:
You decide all you can do for now is wait, and sit down. You relax with your friend, unable to take your eyes off the impressive view of the girl’s colossal upper body. You see her hand rest in front of you, tapping its fingers on the desk every now and then.

After about twenty more minutes, Judy finally takes off her headgear, placing it down beside her keyboard. She grabs the desk and rolls her chair closer, putting her arms on either side of you, as she lays her hands on her keyboard. Her chest hovers in the sky above you, as she leans closer to the monitor. The editor starts working out a few kinks, still unaware of your presence. You move a bit closer to keyboard and start waving your hands up.

It takes another few minutes, but eventually the Mox’s eyes fall on you. She frowns and curls up her nose, taking her hand off her keyboard, and quickly moving her index finger down towards you. You have no time to shout as the pale, sweaty digit of Judy’s finger, pins you against her desk.

“Tssk, fucking bug.” She says.

You try to scream, but are muffled by the soft skin covering your mouth, as the young woman grinds her finger back and forth, squeezing you deeper into her fingerprint. If you didn’t have your implants, you’d be a smudge by now. After torturing you like this for half a minute, Judy raises her finger to see what type of bug it is. You’re stuck to her finger, as she brings it up to her big brown eyes. Her mouth falls open, when she realizes she almost squished a person. Judy lowers her finger to her other hand, and pushes the nail of her thumb against her index finger, scraping you off her digit and letting you drop onto the soft skin of her palm.

She leans in close and squints her eyes. “V, Is that you?!”

A wave of relief washes over you. “Yes, it’s me. Can you hear me?”

“Yes, but it’s pretty quiet, even this close.” She says. “What happened?”

You point and the side of you head. “It’s this dumb malfunctioning relic, it shrunk me and brought me here.”

“How do we fix it?”

You shrug. “I don’t know.”

Judy frowns. “Well, what do you want me to do with you?”
11131.title: The Bug on Judy's Desk

choices: Get used the her feet, like Judy asked, by getting closer.
Try and get Judy's attention again.
Wait beneath the living room table, until she calls you for dinner.
Explore her kitchen.
Explore her bathroom.
111312.content:
“Keep you?” She says. “You mean keep you safe right?”

You sigh. “I don’t see me getting this fixed, so you can have me if you want.”

Judy’s leans back in her chair. “Have you, as like, a thing, an object, or a pet?”

“I guess…”

Her cheeks color into a light blush.

“Well, fine, I’m keeping you.” She says bluntly, in typical Judy fashion.

You smile as Judy closes her fingers around you. She sets you back down on her desk, by tilting her wrist and opening her hand, letting you fall in front of her keyboard. She continues her work, her tattooed arms on either side of you.

“I’m taking you back to my place tonight, just don’t expect first class treatment.” She says. “That tiny size is your inconvenience, not mine.”

She looks down and smiles. “Who knows, I might find some use for you.”

After a day of sitting at Judy’s desk, while she edits brain dances, you watch her fingers lower towards you. The girl plucks you off her desk and keeps you pinched between her digits. You squirm uncomfortably, as she gets up drops you into the pocket of her leather overalls. She closes, up and turns off all her devices, before heading home. You can feel the vibrations of the engine as she drives her van back to her place. Meanwhile, the warmth of her thigh heats up the pocket you’re in.

Once she’s back at her apartment, she takes you out, and sets you down in front of her feet. You look up, as Judy takes off her sneaker boots and socks, placing her bare feet down in front of you. Even though to you they’re meters away, in reality you are in sniffing distance. You cover your nose and see Judy look down at you with her eyebrows raised.

She shrugs and shakes her head, walking away. “If I’m keeping you, you’re gonna have to get used to my feet, I’m not picking you up for everything.”

“Wait, what I do now?!” You shout up at her.

Judy doesn’t seem to hear you anymore. She plops down, and she leans back into the couch.

“Well, now you do what every fucking pet does.” The voice Johnny echoes in the back of your head, before he appears, leaning with his back against Judy’s sneaker. “You run around the house doing whatever you want, until your owner tells to do a trick.”

You walk out into the open floor. “I did give myself to her as some sort of pet, didn’t I?”

Johnny snickers. “Welcome to your new life, kiddo.”

You look around Judy’s home and wonder what’s next.
111312.title: Being Owned by Judy

choices: Judy doesn’t like your remark and forces you to smell her feet
Judy chuckles playfully and enjoys the massage
She doesn't hear you, and hasn't noticed you at her feet
1113121.content:
You look up at her feet. They are larger than you. A musky smell hits your nose, as you start rubbing her foot.

"Ugh jeez, Judy. You should wash these more often."
1113121.title: Getting Used to Judy's Scent

choices: Judy uses her feet to keep playing with you.
She wants to play with you in a different way.
She raises you on to the couch, to watch TV with her.
You have dinner together.
Judy tells you to leave her alone for now.
11131211.content:
Hearing nothing but silence, you look up at Judy’s face. She stares back at you with a curled up nose, her expression; a tired kind of angry. Startled by the nasty look on the cute woman’s face, you take a few steps back. The giantess keeps staring down in annoyance, as she moves her foot towards you. She knocks you over with her big toe, before bulldozing it over you, trapping you underneath it’s printed layer of skin.

“I told you not to expect a five start treatment, V.” She says

You squirm under her toe, unable to respond, as its skin covers you entire face.

Judy tilts her head, trying to see the little friend she trapped. “What do you expect me to do? Run up my bill, by taking multiple showers a day?”

She takes her big toe off you, before covering you with her other toes, gently scrunching them around you, and rubbing them together. As her soft warm skin squeezes around you, it rubs all the sweat, dirt and smell onto your body, until you smell no better yourself.

“This is what feet smell like after a long day of work.” She says. “Take a good whiff and get used to it. I’m not trying to torture you, just telling you how it is.”

She takes her foot off you and tries to force a smile.

“Try and understand from my perspective.” She says. “I like living by myself, I didn’t ask for a bug sized roommate. So, I’m not going to change, or start doing things differently for your sake. You said I could keep you as a pet, so I’m in charge.”

You nod. “Sorry Judy.”

Judy sighs. “It’s fine. I’m sorry for being so hard on you, but I’m not good at this.”

You smell your own clothes and almost gag. “So what now?”
11131211.title: A Lesson in Foot-Stink

choices: Call Panam's number.
Shout for her attention.
Wait in the passenger's seat.
Climb down under her seat until she stops, and opens the car door.
Climb down the her feet to try and climb her body.
112.content:
You open eyes and look up and a familiar face.

“Panam?” You mutter as you get up. “What’s going on?”

The nomad girl doesn’t respond. You sit up and look around, realizing you’re in the passenger’s seat of her car, but everything is much bigger. That’s when you check your own bug sized body and panic. You look back up at your giant friend, who is focusing on the road, driving on her lonesome after another argument with Saul.

Johnny’s hallucination appears next to you, at the same size as you. “Fuck, so where out in the dusty outback, barely being bigger than dust ourselves. Great.”

You spread your arms besides you. “What, so this is my fault, get of my ass.”

“I don’t care whose fault it is.” He says. “Either get this giant outcast’s help, or delta.”

Johnny disappears again, and you take another look at Panam’s giant body. You don’t see a way out of a driving car at this size, so it’s time to think of a plan.
112.title: Tiny Stowaway in Panam's Car

choices: Goes through, Panam gets the call.
Fails to connect, fuck.
A bullet passes through Panam's windshield. Prepare for a bumpy ride
1121.content:
"C'mon, Panam, pickup." You mutter to yourself. You can only hope that your phone will connect at this size.

The call doesn't connect.

"Fuuuuck." You groan and try again. There's no way in hell you're going near Panam like this. You know you should be able to survive short term non-committed pressure with your reinforced skeleton, but you really don't want to prove yourself wrong.

The phone rings, it rings again. With another ring the phone....
1121.title: Calling Panam's Number

choices: Find help and take care of you
Make you hers
11211.content:
The world around you begins to vibrate as Panam gets a call. From you. You're really glad phones are internalized in this day and age. Right before she picks up the call Johnny shows up.

"Careful V, I see 'Saka on your shoulder. Only some kind of unholy luck could cause that to work."

"Hey, V, what's up?" The sound of Panam's voice as she speaks to you sounds like heaven.

"Panam, I kind of need your help." You tell the Nomad. She has already promised to do whatever for you, she called you family. You can only hope this counts.

"Whatever you need, V. We're family, remember?" Those are the words you want to hear. The words that play through your head every night.

"Alright then, Panam. Panam look on the seat next to you." She looks visibly confused by this. God she looks so attractive right now.

"Wait, why? Wait how do you know I'm in my car, V?" Reasonable questions, but you need her to see you.

"Please Panam, just do it. For me." She sighs visibly, as if not believing why she would do this. She turns her gaze while driving to loon at the seat you're on. Until her vision stops on you. Her eyes widen, her mouth gapes.

"V? Is that you?" She slowly decelerate the car. As you reply.

"Yeah, Panam, it's me."

She looks to reach out for you at first, before holding back. As if waiting for permission.

"You can pick me up if you'd like."

She does so all to quickly bringing you up to her face. Her warm breath washes over you. Dry and meaty, just like a nomad.

"V, you're so small." She states obviously. "I guess at this size I'll need to do something."

She ponders for a moment before deciding to...
11211.title: Panam Gets the Call

choices: Stick with the plan, climb the motionless boot.
Rest at Panam's feet for a while to recover from your fall.
Try and climb onto Panam's drink in the cup holder.
Try to climb in to her boot, instead of climbing her body.
Climb onto the break pedal.
1125.content:
You make your way to the edge of the passenger’s seat and look down a carpet below.

You hear the sound of Johnny’s voice behind you. “Think you can make it?”

You’re unsure and get ready to move away from the edge, when the car hits a bump in the road, and makes the decision for you. You are send flying of the chair, screaming all the way down, and painfully crashing right in front of the passenger’s chair. Feeling every part of your body ache, you push yourself off the carpet and grunt. You look up at the nomad and start limping towards her big leather boots.

As you enter the driver’s foot compartment you look around, seeing one of the giantess’ boots pressed against the gas pedal while the other is resting near the breaks. The floor around you is dirty, dusty and covered in sand crumbs. It’s a landscape of things, which at some point found themselves stuck to Panam’s boots. One wrong move, and you’d fit in quite well, as a permanent stain among it all.

You look up between two giant, jeans clad legs, at your choomba, who’s keeping her eyes on the road, and still has no idea, that there is anyone else in the car with her. You sigh and reevaluate your options.
1125.title: The Dirt at Panam's Boots

choices: You continue your plan to climb Panam.
Panam notices something at her feet.
Panam's boot shifts on top of you.
Panam stops the car and takes a break, kicking off her boots.
Panam stops somewhere and gets out of the car.
11252.content:
You sit down in the dirt brought in by Panam’s shoes, and look up at her. You feel the car’s vibrations better than ever. Looking to your side, you see her foot on the gas pedal. Every time she pushes her foot down, the roars and rumbles of the engine shake through your very bones, until she takes her foot back a bit and the vibrations soften. It all feels rather relaxing, looking up at Panam’s beautiful face, having a chill calm car ride with one of your friends. It’s nice, even if she doesn’t know you’re here.

You dare to get a bit closer to her boot, and put you hand up to the leather. The big nomad boot is massive and intimidating, but something about it being Panam, makes you feel safe, even if you’re in the most dangerous situations imaginable. You look over to see Panam take her can of beer out of the cup holder and take a sip. The shifting of her position, causes her foot to move inside of her boot. You see and feel her foot bend the leather to its will. Leather, which to you is so thick you can even budge it.

You decide not to push you luck too much and step away. You look up between Panam’s legs for another twenty minutes, until…
11252.title: Enjoying an Unaware Ride at Panam's Feet

choices: Climb her socks, now that you're absolutely sure she'll keep her feet still.
Shout up at her, now that everything's quiet.
Wait at her socks, until she starts driving again.
Sneak over to her toes and plant a kiss.
Go to the other foot compartment, and sneak into the boot that fell over.
112524.content:
After while of riding unnoticed with Panam, she looks over to the side and turns the steering wheel to go off road. The ground beneath you stirs and shakes more than before on this rocky terrain, making it pretty hard not to roll under the bottom of your friend’s boot. Panam’s foot finally lets go of the gas pedal it’s been hugging for the last hour, while the other one suddenly moves the push down the break.

The giant woman cracks one of her adorable smiles as she stares out of the window, having parked herself in a spot with a great view. It’s a view you’ll never get to see however, as in your position, the only thing you get to look at, is a titan sized Panam, but maybe that’s not too bad of a view either. Your traveling companion leans against the back of her seat, pulling the lever to it tilt a bit.

“Can’t beat this freedom.” She says. “I don’t know how those city folk do it, being cooped up like that.”

Panam looks down at her boots. Your eyes widen in surprise, thinking she might have seen you.

“Speaking about cooped up.” She says, before raising her knee.

You realize want she means, when she takes off her boot, setting it down in the foot compartment of the passenger seat, before lowering a grey socked foot down towards you. You run to the side and dodge it just in time. Then her other boot gets raised off the ground, and pulled off the giant woman’s foot. This time she accidentally lets it fall over, when she puts it in the passenger’s foot area. You almost squeak like a mouse, when her other foot also descents on you. You run so hard in the other direction you almost bump into her resting foot.

Panam smiles. “Feels good to let them some air, good thing no one’s around to smell ‘em.”

That’s where she’s wrong though, not only could you smell her feet, but you were so close the entire air was poison to you. Now that she was finally keeping them still, you found yourself with one of Panam’s socks on either side of you. You walk up to the toe end to make your way out from between the woman’s feet, trying to covering your nose in vain. As you sit down in front of your friend’s feet, looking the shape of her toes beneath fabric of her socks, you wonder how her foot smell could be this bad. You guess, it was probably normal for a nomad like Panam, having your socks locked up for days, in boots like these, in the middle of the boiling hot badlands, those feet where bound to develop a strong scent.

The longer you’re forced to sit at your friend’s dirty grey socks, the more you get used to their smell. You stop letting yourself be bothered by it, and appreciate the company of your friend, even if she’s unaware of yours.
112524.title: The Smell of a Nomad's Socks

choices: Panam notices something in her boot, and checks what it is.
Panam notices something in her boot, and squishes it between her toes.
You remain unnoticed, until she gets out of the car and crushes you.
You're lucky, and she takes another break later
You try calling her number.
1125245.content:
As Panam leans back in the driver’s seat, closing her eyes, you think about her boots. Be it boredom, or some guilty pleasure, you decide to walk around Panam’s socks, and make your way towards the passenger’s foot compartment. There, one of her boots stand like a massive tower, while the other has fallen over, presenting you with a giant round entrance to its cave. You smile and step a bit closer, when Johnny appears, sitting down on the edge of the boot’s entrance.

“Don’t tell me you’re stupid enough to do this.” He says. “You got a death wish or something?”

You shrug. “I’ll delta before she even thinks of putting it back on.”

Johnny shakes his head and disappears. You climb up on the border and make your way halfway into the boot. The smell is even worse here, socks can be changed easily, but what these old boots where carrying, was a rancid smell you can’t seem to adapt to. You touch the wet fabric of the wall, feeling the sweat that had built up between it and Panam’s bare leg. You were exploring the inside of your choomba’s boot, it was weird, disgusting, but exciting at the same time. You hear movement outside and look towards entrance of the nomad’s footwear, deciding it’s time to leave. You see two giant fingers wrap around the side of the exit, and you heart sinks.

“Wait, Panam, no!”

Panam picks up her boot, the surface tilting and sending you tumbling all the way down, onto the insole. You scurry around and look up, but there is nothing you can do. You’re powerless, as the nomad’s grey sock blocks out all the light on its way down towards you. This time there is no dodging, you’re stuck in the exact place reserved for her sole. The best you can do is run for the toe end as her socked toes crawl toward you. The tip of her second toe presses against you, forcing you to not only smell it, but taste it. You squirm, but it’s no use. Outside Panam can be heard putting on her other boot, before pulling the lever to straighten her seat. She starts the car, and you can feel her move the boot you’re in, back onto the gas pedal.

The nomad woman continues her ride through the badlands, unaware that her friend is the size of a bug, slowly sliding under her toes. You struggle to breathe, as the wind gets knocked out of you every time she presses down on the gas. The air around you is humid as Panam’s sweat vaporizes, forcing you to inhale it. You sink deeper under her toes, until you’re under their arching spot, where they have folded the wet sweaty sock. Under the arches of her toes, you have a bit more room to squirm and breathe, if only the air wasn’t slowly suffocating you with the horrid stench of the nomad’s feet.

Her repeated pressing of the pedal, although painful, isn’t enough to kill you, but if Panam got out of the car, you know her full weight would be bearing down on you. You wonder if this is it, if this is how you’ll die. At least the ride up until now has been a nice final memory, being out in the desert with Panam.
1125245.title: Exploring Panam's Boot

11252452.content:
Panam frowns as she feels something under her toes. She gives you a soft squeeze to see what you are. You let out a painful cry, as her socked toes press your fragile little body beyond its limits. Feeling it’s something malleable, Panam keeps kneading her toes, squeezing you between them repeatedly. You scream for mercy, but your words are muffled by the sock that keeps forcing feeding you your friend’s sweat. The nomad woman taps her steering wheel and smiles, enjoying her drive through the open desert, while she plays with whatever is between her toes. You get beaten and bruised for twenty minutes, her sock rubbing burns onto your skin, while your wounds get salted by her sweat.

At this point it’s probably for the best that Panam doesn’t know it’s you, she has put you through torture, even the worst of Night City can’t compete with, and she isn’t done yet. The nomad focuses on the feeling between her toes, and decides to go for a real hard squeeze. Her toes clench together and you scream in agony as your bones break and your skin rips, until you body’s shape perfectly fits in to the free space under her toes. As you start to bleed out, Panam feels something wet gush between her toes, she frowns. The woman takes her foot off the gas and starts twisting her boot onto the car floor. You get to scream one last time, smell your friend’s foot one last time, taste her sweat one last time, and think of her beautiful face one last time, before your head bursts under the pressure of Panam’s toes.

Satisfied, the Panam pulls over to the side of the road, to check the mess she made. She places her leg on her knee and slips off her boot. She checks between the toes of her wet dirty sock, and notices the blood. At first she assumes it’s a bug, but then she notices the tiny clothes, and what looks like a cybernetic limb. Her eyes widen and a smile creeps across her face.

“Wow, those city folks do some insane body modification.” She says. “Well, this is one logical outcome to turning yourself into a bug.”

Panam laughs and shakes her head. Not knowing it’s her friend, the nomad girl leaves the batter decoration under her socked toes, and lowers her foot back into her boot. Panam starts the car, and continues her way through the badlands. She will never hear from you again, and your friend will never find out how she caused and laughed at your demise.

“How did you even end up in my boot?” She mumbles to herself with a wide smile.
11252452.title: Squished Inside Panam's Boot

choices: Panam looks over and sees you.
Panam takes her drink without looking, and you fall into her cleavage.
Panam takes her drink without looking, and you fall into the can.
11253.content:
Seeing Panam’s massive boots makes you’re a bit reluctant to go with your original plan of climbing her. You look around for another way to get her attention, when your eyes fall on a can of beer, standing in a cup holder like a lighthouse on a big rock. The surface on the way to the can seems climbable, as for the can itself; you remember having installed magnetic grips on your hands at a ripperdoc. This would be a much safer climb, than an unpredictably moving human body.

You move away from Panam’s feet and start griping the small dents in the car’s interior. As you’re about halfway, the car hits a bump causing you almost lose your grip, with a mini heart attack, you hug the surface, and you look behind you at the nomad girl’s pretty face. She’s got her eyes on the road, and her mind elsewhere.

Eventually you reach the top of the cup holder, and the foot of ‘mount beer can’. You take a look at your hands, and put them against the metal, there is a small buzzing sound as they attach. Seeing the tech works, you start the final stretch of your climb. Moving up the cold feeling, water condensed metal of a cooled drink. When you reach the last bit, you pull yourself over the ring onto the flat top of the can. As you sit down and take a breather, you can see the raised pull tab, and the hole it created.

“Wouldn’t take a swim in there.” Johnny says, appearing to sit right on the edge, dangling his legs into the can.

You sigh. “Did you really think I needed obvious advice right now, or are you just bored?”

Johnny smiles and disappears. You look up at Panam and wait for her eyes to fall on the can.
11253.title: Climbing Panam's Beer

choices: You're fast enough, and avoid being dragged into her mouth.
You're too late, and go down with the rest of the beer.
112533.content:
As you wait for Panam to see you, all you can do is stare up at her. It gives you weird butterflies in the gut, to you see your choomba sit in front of you, like some sort of goddess. The woman, keeping her eyes on the road, reaches her giant hand towards the can. You try to scream at her to look down, but that scream is quickly turned into one of terror, as the can is picked up and you lose your footing. You tumble down into the hole.

With a fearful cry, you disappear into the dark, splashing into the beer below. You surface, and cough up some of the cheap beer you inhaled. While you swim in the sticky, foul smelling pool, you can feel your surroundings shift, as Panam holds the can upside down. You manage to keep your head above water, but feel sudden rushes of gravity, in the pattern of the woman’s chugs. You realize every short shock, which feels like falling, means there is a sip less in the can, a sip less, between you and Panam’s mouth. You panic, but there is nothing you can do expect splash your arms around in your friend’s drink. Is she really going to chug it all in one go?

As you near her lips, you think of one last idea. Your magnetic grip. If you manage to swim to the side of the can, you can hold on to it until she puts her drink down.
112533.title: Stuck in Panam's Drink

1125332.content:
You almost reach the side of the can, when a final shock of gravity sends you down. It’s like the feeling of snapping awake from a dream, except you don’t. You hit the soft pillow-like surface of her upper lip, while the rest of the beer disappears into her mouth. Panam sets the can back down, and you look in front of you. You hyperventilate, as you can see the steering wheel and the road ahead from the height of Panam’s face. You smile, because you though you’d never see daylight like this again. You breathe more easily, feeling saved, as you squirm, trying to unstick yourself from the nomad woman’s lip.

As quickly as your unware friend gives you hope, she takes it away again. She opens her mouth, and the sight of her enormous pink tongue grows in front of you. The wet surface presses against you, squeezing you between it and the woman’s lip, before pulling you down with it, into Panam’s mouth. All you can do is scream, as the pool of beer from earlier, is traded for one of saliva. Not wanting to drown under her tongue, you climb her gums and hold on to the crown of one of her molars. You try to catch your breath, but all you can catch is Panam’s breath, inhaling her humid, second hand, leftover oxygen. You look over at the giant white rock you’re holding onto, shivering as you realize what it is. Looking up, you see the tooth that fits onto this one. You hope your friend doesn’t bite down and crush your hands.

Your rest is interrupted as Panam’s tongue moves around her mouth. Not wanting to get pushes under it again, you decide to jump on top. You hurl you self onto it and slide a bit deeper into her mouth. You try and scurry back to the tip her tongue, but it’s too wet and slimy, making you slip and fall every time you try to stand. Noticing something on her tongue, Panam assumes it a bit of food, which got unstuck from her teeth. Her tongue raises you up to the roof of her mouth, and rubs against you with its bubbly texture. As the giantess checks what you could be, you grunt and cry, but it’s no use. After playing with the little tooth speck for a few seconds, Panam throws her tongue back and lets you slide into her throat. You beg for mercy, as her muscles open, and her saliva causes you to slip into her esophagus.

You cry as you sink down her throat, covered in slime, and descent past the beautiful nomad’s beating heart. Your self-pity is interrupted by another startling drop, when her esophagus ends and you fall into a sea of beer and stomach acid. You swim as best you can, surrounded by gurgling sounds and foul smelling gas. You can’t see much and accidentally bump into the wall of Panam’s stomach. Just as you think you’ll suffocate on the gas buildup, the stomach clenches and Panam lets out a loud burping blench. No shame or pardon to it, as the woman has no idea anyone is around to hear it. You think about Panam, and how you’ll soon be broken apart and taken into her body, as the acid starts to eat away at your skin until you can’t swim anymore. You lose consciousness, as your friend’s body steals away too much of you to survive. Soon all your organic tissue is dissolved. Your bones and cybernetics sink into the deep.

Outside, Panam enjoys a relaxing drive, feeling the warm sun on her skin, completely oblivious to the cruel fate of her friend.
1125332.title: Speck of Food to Panam

115555.title: Characters - Set 5

info.brief_description: You're shrunk around one of the women in Night City. Can you survive?
info.description:
[Spoiler Warning for the Actual Game]


Story
In this interactive you are (V) the player character of the Cyberpunk 2077.
After a heist going wrong and getting the digital spirit of Johnny Silverhand stuck in your head,
the broken Arasaka chip reveals another unbelievable ability.
During one of the relic’s malfunctions you end up shrunk and teleported to the first person that happens to cross your mind.
Either current day, or to anyone in the past.
After this the mission objective is simple; Try and stay alive.


Characters
There are currently 20 character options. As this is a fanfiction of a known property, there is an entire wiki where you can find info and pictures of the characters, making in unnecessary to describe them in detail here. If you don’t know who someone is, just Google them. If I missed anyone, just send me a message and I’ll add them.


Allowed
Death Scenes
(These are encouraged, but leave options to avoid it.)
Scat and Other Bathroom Content
(This is allowed, but put a warning at the start of your chapter, and leave options to avoid it.)
Short Chapters
(You’re allowed to make short chapters, even ones only a few sentences long, if it’s meant to be a transitional chapter. But one sentence death scenes and clear low effort content will be removed.)
Long Chapters
(You can fill up the entire 10k character limit if you want to.)
Ignoring Established Sizes
(If someone describes V as the size of a finger in one chapter, you can pretend they're a micro in the next. Whatever fits your preference, I know this might be a bid inconsistent, but I prefer to keep the size flexible and ambiguous to keep a lot of creative freedom with interactions. In your chapter V is whatever size you choose.)


Not Allowed
No Interactions With Anyone Under 18.
(Not even transitional!)
Male Content
(You’re allowed to have males in the background, or short interactions that transition back to female content, but dedicated male content will be deleted.)
Invincibility
(You’re allowed to have V survive something that would be deadly, like being eaten or stepped on, by claiming cybernetics protected you, just don’t suggest that V is completely invincible and treat these things as a real danger. Don't rob people of a good death scene and leave a death option every time you let V survive.)
Don't Describe V's Size With an Exact Number
(You can describe them comparatively, like bug, or dust, or the size of an apple, but don't use an exact number, this keeps some ambiguity and suspension of disbelief, when others pretend the player is bigger or smaller in later chapters, as per the last entry in 'allowed'.)
No Languages Other Than English.
(Unless a character is speaking a different language in dialogue.)
No Diapers


Suggestions
Write in Present Tense
(Try to write as if everything is happening right now, as its being read. “You are tiny”, instead of “you were tiny”.)
Write in Second Person
(Refer to V as “You”, and write as if the reader is the person everything is happening to.)
Add Choices You Don't Like
(I doubt you will write all the chapters you’ll leave choices for, so add a choice for something you’re not into every now and then, so people with different tastes can add the story too.)
Let Johnny Silverhand appear beside the reader sometimes, to give commentary.


Words of Encouragement
Other than that, I hope you’ll have fun here and this will grow into a long branching interactive.
If you have any questions or requests, send me a message.

See you in Night City Choomba, or maybe not, you might be too small…
